chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. CP No.D-4247 of 2020 For orders as to maintainability of the petition 06.09.2021 This petition was presented in Court on 28.2.2020 and on the last date of hearing i.e. 30.08.2021 none was present on behalf of the petitioner. Even today position is the same. Besides, no intimation is available on record. It seems that the petitioner has lost interest and not pursuing the instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. Chief Justice Judge
